Rome, NY • Italian Restaurant & Wine Bar

Flavors with Italian Flair. Nights to Remember.

Come hungry, stay happy — Franca's brings the flavor, fun, and craft drinks you've been craving!

Call UsPlan Your NightOrder on DoorDash
Warm, upscale atmosphere
Live music & karaoke
Easy parking in back

An inviting Italian escape in the heart of Rome

Franca's Roma brings you delicious dishes with Italian flair, craft drinks, and a cozy, lively atmosphere every night. Come for the flavors, stay for the music — and park with ease in our spacious back lot, complete with handicap-accessible spaces.

Warm, polished, welcoming

Designed for date nights, friends' nights, and relaxed celebrations with elevated food, wine, and atmosphere.

View Menu

Elevated Dishes

Italian flair cuisine crafted to pair beautifully with our wine list and cocktails.

Wines & Craft Beer

Wine & Craft Beer

Wines, craft beers, and handcrafted cocktails for every kind of evening out.

View Events

Live Entertainment

Weekly karaoke, music, and more to keep the room vibrant and memorable.

Contact Us

Private Events

Date nights, friends' nights, and celebrations with a premium yet comfortable feel.

Upcoming Live Music

A stylish calendar of nights worth dressing up for — check back often for new acts and special dates.

Happy Fourth of July!

Monk Rowe & John Hutson

Before your Capitol Theatre show, make Franca's your first stop for good food, good drinks, and an easy start to a great night!

Host Your Next Event at Franca's

BirthdaysAnniversariesCorporate Gatherings

Birthdays, anniversaries, corporate gatherings, and special celebrations deserve a setting that feels effortless and elevated. Franca's Roma blends warm service, great food, and a lively wine-bar mood that makes every gathering memorable.

Book Your Event

Explore branded merchandise and bring a little of Franca's style into your everyday routine.
